hooks.command: f=$(node -e 'let d="";process.stdin.on("data",c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on("end",()=>{try{process.stdout.write(JSON.parse(d).tool_input?.file_path||"")}catch{}})'); case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx) [ -f "$f" ] && pnpm exec eslint --fix "$f" >/dev/null 2>&1;; esac; exit 0
files=$(git diff --name-only --diff-filter=ACMR HEAD -- '*.ts' '*.tsx' 2>/dev/null); [ -n "$files" ] && pnpm exec prettier --write $files >/dev/null 2>&1; exit 0
